content.fact: Dobby warns Harry but the Lucius-diary plot and Dobby’s full motive are not known to Harry for most of Year 2.
content.injection: Treat Dobby’s warning as alarming but incomplete; do not expose Lucius Malfoy’s diary plant, Dobby’s full reasoning, or the final liberation outcome before those anchors.

entries.title: Harry suspicion begins after Parseltongue exposure

context.label: After Parseltongue exposure before Chamber resolution
